import io
import string
import list

fn parse_ints(_ s: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = 0
  mut sign = 1
  mut in_num = false
  let n = string.len(s)
  mut i = 0
  while i < n
    let bopt = string.byte_at(s, i)
    match bopt
    when Some(b)
      if b >= 48 and b <= 57
        cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
        in_num = true
      else if b == 45 and not in_num
        sign = -1
        in_num = true
      else
        if in_num
          nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
          cur = 0
          sign = 1
          in_num = false
        end
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    nums = list.push(nums, cur * sign)
  end
  nums
end

fn get_int(_ xs: List<Int>, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match xs.get(i)
  when Some(v)
    v
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn read_or_empty() -> String
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
end

let line1 = read_or_empty()
let line2 = read_or_empty()
let nums = parse_ints(line1)
let t_opt = string.parse_int(string.trim(line2))
let target = match t_opt
when Some(n)
  n
when None
  0
end

let total = nums.len()
mut found = false
mut fi = 0
mut fj = 0
mut i = 0
while i < total and not found
  mut j = i + 1
  while j < total and not found
    let a = get_int(nums, i)
    let b = get_int(nums, j)
    if a + b == target
      fi = i
      fj = j
      found = true
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  i = i + 1
end

if found
  println("found=#{fi},#{fj}")
else
  println("none")
end
